ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the patient */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the patient */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the patient */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the patient */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the patient */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subject_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "admissions" (
  "row_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each admission record */,
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "hadm_id" INTEGER /* Hospital admission ID */,
  "admittime" TEXT /* Time of admission */,
  "dischtime" TEXT /* Time of discharge */,
  "deathtime" TEXT /* Time of death (if applicable) */,
  "admission_type_id" INTEGER /* Type of admission (Emergency, Elective, etc.) */,
  "admission_location_id" INTEGER /* Location of admission */,
  "discharge_location_id" INTEGER /* Location of discharge */,
  "insurance_id" INTEGER /* Insurance type */,
  "admission_diagnosis" TEXT /* Primary diagnosis at admission */,
  "discharge_disposition" TEXT /* Disposition at discharge (e.g., home, rehab) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("row_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_admissions_admission_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("admission_type_id") REFERENCES admission_types ("admission_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_admissions_subject_id FOREIGN KEY ("subject_id") REFERENCES patients ("subject_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_admissions_insurance_id FOREIGN KEY ("insurance_id") REFERENCES insurance ("insurance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_admissions_discharge_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("discharge_location_id") REFERENCES discharge_locations ("discharge_location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_admissions_admission_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("admission_location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "insurance" (
  "insurance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each insurance provider */,
  "insurance_name" TEXT /* Name of the insurance provider */,
  "insurance_type" TEXT /* Type of insurance (e.g., Medicare, Medicaid, Private) */,
  "premium" REAL /* Monthly premium of the insurance */,
  "coverage" TEXT /* Coverage details of the insurance */,
  "deductible" REAL /* Deductible amount of the insurance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("insurance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location (e.g., Emergency Room, Rehab) */,
  "location_type" TEXT /* Type of location (e.g., ER, Ward, Home Health Care) */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the location */,
  "available_beds" INTEGER /* Number of available beds in the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "admission_types" (
  "admission_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each admission type */,
  "admission_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the admission type (e.g., Emergency, Elective) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the admission type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("admission_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "discharge_locations" (
  "discharge_location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each discharge location */,
  "discharge_location_name" TEXT /* Name of the discharge location (e.g., Home, Rehab) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("discharge_location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Doctor, Nurse, Admin) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for system access */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Role of the user within the system */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the record */,
  "row_id" INTEGER /* ID of the admission record accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time the record was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_row_id FOREIGN KEY ("row_id") REFERENCES admissions ("row_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "treatments" (
  "treatment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each treatment */,
  "row_id" INTEGER /* ID of the admission record */,
  "treatment_name" TEXT /* Name of the treatment */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the treatment */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the treatment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the treatment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("treatment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treatments_row_id FOREIGN KEY ("row_id") REFERENCES admissions ("row_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medications" (
  "medication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medication */,
  "row_id" INTEGER /* ID of the admission record */,
  "medication_name" TEXT /* Name of the medication */,
  "dosage" TEXT /* Dosage of the medication */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the medication */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the medication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("medication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medications_row_id FOREIGN KEY ("row_id") REFERENCES admissions ("row_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lab_results" (
  "lab_result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lab result */,
  "row_id" INTEGER /* ID of the admission record */,
  "lab_test_name" TEXT /* Name of the lab test */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the lab test */,
  "test_time" TEXT /* Time the lab test was conducted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lab_result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lab_results_row_id FOREIGN KEY ("row_id") REFERENCES admissions ("row_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "diagnoses" (
  "diagnosis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each diagnosis */,
  "row_id" INTEGER /* ID of the admission record */,
  "diagnosis_name" TEXT /* Name of the diagnosis */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the diagnosis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("diagnosis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_diagnoses_row_id FOREIGN KEY ("row_id") REFERENCES admissions ("row_id")
)
